name: USS PC-624 (PC-624)
events: 11 Dec 1942 USS PC-624 picks up 30 survivors from the British merchant Nigerian that was torpedoed and sunk on 9 December 1942 by German U-boat U-508 about 130 nautical miles south-east of Trinidad in position 09°17'N, 59°00'W.
31 Jul 1943 The Italian submarine Velella was unsuccessfully attacked with depth charges by USS PC-624 north-west of Malta, in position 36°40'N, 12°28'E.
